title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
